ab: kemuda u mukuwa i taluan?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: mipaliding ku mukuwa.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: kemuda mukuwa i biyoing intaw?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: kemakawang mukuwa i biyoing intaw.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: kemuda u mukuwa i bokuto?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: muicas ku da hikoki mukuwa i Bokuto.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: kemuda u mukuwa i Sanasan?
en: How do you go to Green Island?

ab: muicas ku kana sudang mukuwa i Sanasan.
en: I go to Green Island by boat.

ab: muicas u da eman muruma’?
en: How do you go home?

ab: muicas ku da ciēyun muruma’.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: muicas da eman i Mumuy mukuwa i kungkuwan?
en: How does Mumuy go to school?

ab: muicas da kissiya i Mumuy mukuwa i kungkuwan.
en: Mumuy goes to school by train.

ab: muicas da eman i kadaw mukuwa i Kalēngko?
en: How does kadaw go to church?

ab: midinsiya i Kadaw mukuwa i Kalēngko.
en: Kadaw goes to church by bicycle.

ab: muicas u da ciēyun mukuwa i kungkuwan?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: melri, muicas ku da bas mukuwa i kungkuwan.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: midinsiya u mukuwa i kungkuwan?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: ai, midinsiya ku mukuwa i kungkuwan.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: muicas u da kawtiyē mukuwa i takaw?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: ai, muicas ku da kawtiyē mukuwa i Takaw.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: nu mukuwa u i valangaw mu, muicas u da kissiya? melri mu, mau na hikoki?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: muicas ku da hikoki, maradika na hikoki kana kissiya.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: nu mukuwa u i Valangaw mu, muicas u da bas? midusiya u?
ch: A:你去台東搭公車嗎?開車嗎?
en: Are you going to drive to Taitung or take the bus?

ab: midusiya ku mukuwa i Valangaw, marakalra’ayan kana bas nu midusiya ku.
ch: B:我是開車去台東，我開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to Taitung because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: adalrep kanmu ruma’ na Supermarket?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: adi adalrep, miotobay ku mukuwa i Supermarket.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: adalrep i kungkuwan na yubingkiyok?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: adalrep, kemakawang ta meredek ta lra.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: adalrep i ēki na akaakanan?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: nu mupacalan ta i ēki mu, makawang ta diya lruwaca vungkang mu, meredek ta lra.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
